cf_parsed.subtask_body: I have verified that the absolute minimum edge cost to connect Port, Pine, and Rock is 47 (using Cape-Pine, Cape-Rock, Port-Rock). This requires 2 frequencies due to the Cape/Pine interference, resulting in a total cost of 77. The 1-frequency tree using Mill-Port, Mill-Pine, and Port-Rock has an edge cost of 56 and a total cost of 71. Since 71 < 77, the 1-frequency tree is optimal.
